Pack: # Covers FS3 and FS4. Source of truth for FrankHitReactionDB SO and FSAttackData SO batch creation.
# Role     : Attack | Reaction | Conditional | KO | Getup | SoftLanding | Grapple_Attacker | Grapple_Victim | Locomotion | Utility
# HitLevel : High | Mid | Low | Sweep | Launch  (blank = not a hit)
# HitWeight: Lite | Full                         (blank = not a hit)
# Context  : Front | Back | Left | Right | Air | Wall | Ground | Spin | Groggy | Stun (blank = Front)
# HitLevel maps to FSAttackData._hitLevel. HitWeight maps to FSAttackData._hitWeight.
# Attack clips become FSAttackData SOs; set HitLevel+HitWeight to determine which Reaction pool fires.
# NOTE: FS3 listing may be incomplete -- glob was truncated. Verify in Project window.
# NOTE: FS4 clips live inside multi-clip FBX containers (numbered 01-24 FBX files).
